findings.name: IGF VII Cash Event Triplication
findings.description: 456_meridian_three_fund_seed.sql was run 3 times on 2026-02-27 without idempotency guards on the 2026 Q1/Q2 cash events. 8 events each appeared 3×, producing 16 duplicate rows.

metric_impact.dpi: WRONG — both numerator and denominator contaminated

findings.residual_risk: Released 2026Q2 IGF VII snapshot metrics still reflect pre-dedup data. Must re-promote after fixing scope (F-05) and Defect B (F-07).

findings.name: Orphan Fund Rows (NF-1)
findings.description: Two orphan fund rows existed with entity graphs (8-11 deals each) but zero cash events. Any JOIN from repe_fund → repe_deal → repe_asset without fund_id filter would double-count deal/asset rows for MREF III and MCOF I.

metric_impact.rollup_joins: Potential JOIN multiplication if not filtered by canonical fund_id

findings.residual_risk: Orphan rows quarantined. Canonical fund_id filter on all rollup queries eliminates further risk.

findings.name: canonical_metrics JSONB key mismatch (NF-2)
findings.description: Snapshot builder writes 'tvpi' as the gross TVPI key in canonical_metrics. Any code reading canonical_metrics->>'gross_tvpi' silently gets null. The correct key is 'tvpi'.

metric_impact.gross_tvpi: Silent null wherever 'gross_tvpi' key is read instead of 'tvpi'

findings.residual_risk: Phase 7 lint scanner 'canonical_metrics_key_drift' will catch all remaining occurrences.

findings.name: beginning_nav = 0 in snapshots (NF-3)
findings.description: Snapshot builder computed beginning_nav by summing beginning_nav_attributable from SELECTED_INVESTMENT_IDS. For IGF VII, only Tech Campus North was selected, and Tech Campus North had nav=0 in 2026Q1. Result: fund beginning_nav = 0 despite $66.8M NAV at 2025Q4. Code fix: fallback to prior released snapshot ending_nav when investment aggregation produces 0. Data fix: migration 466 corrected all 5 IGF VII 2026Q2 rows.

metric_impact.period_return: Period return denominator was 0 (division by zero for any period-return computation)
metric_impact.pl_attribution: Opening balance was wrong for any 2026Q2 bridge or waterfall report

findings.residual_risk: None. Fixed in DB and code. MREF III and MCOF I were not affected.

findings.name: Snapshot builder scope restriction (SCOPING)
findings.description: SELECTED_INVESTMENT_IDS in the snapshot builder covers only 4 investments across 3 funds: Tech Campus North (IGF VII, 1/20), MRF III Dallas + Phoenix (MREF III, 2/2 — full coverage), Midtown Towers (MCOF I, 1/8). IGF VII and MCOF I snapshots cover massively incomplete portfolios.

metric_impact.IGF VII ending_nav: $44.3M reported vs $1,446M actual full portfolio — $1,402M understatement
metric_impact.IGF VII gross_irr: -84.09% (economically impossible — should be strongly positive with full portfolio)

findings.residual_risk: All IGF VII and MCOF I metrics are unsafe for investor reporting until scope is expanded and snapshots re-promoted.

findings.name: MREF III stale JV quarter state (STALE_CACHE)
findings.migration_fix: none — JV quarter state rebuild required
findings.description: Dallas Multifamily Cluster asset states were updated 2026-04-09 23:58 UTC. MREF III 2026Q2 snapshot was built 2026-04-10 02:30 UTC using a JV quarter state row that predated the asset update. The snapshot captured a stale $34.3M cluster NAV instead of the current $42.9M.
findings.residual_risk: JV quarter state for Dallas Cluster must be rebuilt from current asset states. Snapshot must be re-promoted.

findings.name: Defect B — Fail-open waterfall carry
findings.description: re_fund_metrics.py:111-128 _compute_waterfall_carry() catches (LookupError, ValueError, ImportError) from run_waterfall() and falls back to simplified carry formula (0.20 × (gross_return - 0.08 × total_called)) instead of returning None. Violates SYSTEM_RULES_AUTHORITATIVE_STATE.md Rule 3. For 2026Q2, no waterfall runs exist for any of the 3 funds → fallback fires on every metric computation.

metric_impact.carry_shadow: Returns $0 (fallback) instead of None — numerically correct for Meridian 2026Q2 (all funds underwater) but semantically wrong
metric_impact.net_irr: Computed as if carry = 0; should be None with null_reason

findings.residual_risk: Zero numeric contamination for Meridian 2026Q2 (carry = $0 either way). Future periods with positive gross_return would produce wrong carry from the fallback formula. Must patch before any fund returns to profitability.

findings.name: Defect A — Asymmetric ownership weighting (direct-asset path)
funds_affected: DORMANT — future environments with direct-held assets
findings.description: re_rollup.py L151-168 (JV path) applies ownership multiplier. L192-218 (direct-asset path, jv_id IS NULL) does NOT. For Meridian: all 42 assets have jv_id IS NOT NULL → zero blast radius. Defect is dormant for this environment.

metric_impact.fund_nav: Potentially incorrect for any fund with direct-held assets (jv_id IS NULL)

findings.residual_risk: Must patch before any new environment with direct-held assets is onboarded. No Meridian metric impact confirmed.

findings.name: Defect C-1 — NAV reads from legacy re_fund_quarter_state
findings.description: compute_return_metrics() in re_fund_metrics.py:288-295 reads NAV from re_fund_quarter_state (legacy) instead of re_authoritative_fund_state_qtr via get_authoritative_state(). Violates INV-1. re_fund_metrics_qtr rows may show different DPI/TVPI/IRR values than the authoritative snapshot, causing UI tiles to disagree with each other.

metric_impact.re_fund_metrics_qtr: May differ from authoritative snapshot by the delta between legacy and authoritative NAV values

findings.residual_risk: Active for all funds. Patch C blocks compute_return_metrics from writing when authoritative state is not released.

findings.name: Defect C-2 — No event_date filter in cash event aggregation (NEW CRITICAL)
findings.description: compute_return_metrics() cash event aggregation query (re_fund_metrics.py:299-308) has NO event_date <= quarter_end filter. All cash events including future-dated Q3/Q4 2026 planned events are summed into total_called and total_distributed. Violates INV-2 period coherence.
findings.residual_risk: Active for all funds. Any computation using re_fund_metrics_qtr metrics is contaminated until Patch C adds the event_date filter. The authoritative snapshot is NOT affected (uses separate pipeline).

findings.name: MREF III total_called > total_committed
findings.description: MREF III has total_called = $774M in re_cash_event but repe_fund.target_size (used as total_committed proxy) = $500M. A fund cannot call more capital than is committed. Either: (a) the seed data incorrectly over-seeded CALL events for MREF III, (b) the target_size field does not represent committed capital, or (c) some calls are miscategorized. The $774M call amount drives the near-zero TVPI (0.07) and near-(-100%) IRR for MREF III.

metric_impact.gross_irr: Near -99% — may improve substantially if overcall is corrected

findings.residual_risk: MREF III metrics unreliable until total_called vs total_committed discrepancy is resolved.

findings.name: MCOF I total_committed = $0
findings.description: repe_fund.target_size = 0 for MCOF I. The committed capital field is unset. No impact on metric computation (total_committed not used in the IRR/DPI formula chain) but means the committed/called ratio cannot be computed and investor reporting would show 0% deployment.
findings.residual_risk: Low — does not affect NAV, IRR, DPI, TVPI computation.

findings.name: MREF III and MCOF I inception_date = NULL
findings.description: inception_date is NULL on repe_fund for MREF III and MCOF I. The IRR engine cannot validate that cash events fall after fund inception. The engine falls back to the first CALL event date (2025-01-15 for both) as the effective start, which is correct behavior — but the check cannot run.

metric_impact.irr_start_anchor: Falls back to first CALL event — correct numerically but unvalidated

findings.residual_risk: Low. Set inception_date before Phase 4a assertions can run fully.

findings.name: IGF VII waterfall tiers 1-3 have NULL split_gp / split_lp
findings.description: re_waterfall_tier tiers 1-3 for IGF VII have split_gp = NULL and split_lp = NULL. Only tier 4 has explicit splits. This likely causes a TypeError or ValueError in run_waterfall for IGF VII — the catch in Defect B masks this error. Tiers 1-3 carry implied splits (0%/100% for ROC and preferred, 100%/0% for catch-up) that must be made explicit.

metric_impact.run_waterfall: Fails for IGF VII → Defect B fallback fires → net metrics use policy approximation

findings.residual_risk: Even after Patch B (fail-closed), the real waterfall run will fail for IGF VII until the NULL splits are populated.

findings.name: 4 IGF VII assets with negative NAV
findings.description: Campus Edge Apartments (-$3.2M), Ironworks Mixed-Use (-$1.8M), Meridian Medical Plaza (-$11.1M), Meridian Office Tower a1b2c3d4-9001-... (-$52.9M) have negative 2026Q2 NAV. Negative NAV = debt exceeds appraised value. These assets depress full-portfolio NAV by ~$69M.
findings.residual_risk: Requires asset-level economic review. Not a calculation error per se — negative NAV from over-leveraged assets is economically valid.
